description: An aerial orthophoto displaying land cover features in a predominantly forested area in Sweden, likely near Gåby, with a reddish tint characteristic of false-colour infrared imagery for vegetation. A large area of dense forest and some bare ground/sandy patches is delineated by a red outline. Within this red-outlined area, a distinct water body or wetland feature is outlined in light blue. Text labels visible on the image identify this light blue feature as "Gåby den låga Lilla channel". There is no visible scale bar, compass, or explicit date within the image, but the surrounding document context indicates such images are from aerial orthophotos, possibly from Lantmäteriet, Sweden, or SPOT-5 imagery from 2012.
